name: nft-to-pet
description: Import AVTR pet NFT sprites from a public Solana wallet into local Codex pet folders.

interface.shortDescription: Imports owned AVTR NFT pet sprites by public wallet address.
interface.longDescription: Scans a public Solana wallet for AVTR pet NFTs, downloads their spritesheets and backgrounds, and writes Codex-compatible pet folders locally. It never needs a private key or wallet signature.
defaultPrompt: Import AVTR pets for this wallet
Sync my AVTR NFT pets into Codex
List AVTR pets owned by a wallet
